heading: Inclusion of Indian tribes
label: 10105 Inclusion of Indian tribes
text: For purposes of sections 10103 and 10104 of this title, the term “State” includes an Indian tribal government.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3712c of Title 42Another was renumbered section 109 and is classified to .section 105 of Pub. L. 90–351section 10109 of this title

Effective DateSection effective with respect to appropriations for fiscal year 2007 and for each fiscal year thereafter, see , set out as a note under .section 1121(c) of Pub. L. 109–162section 10103 of this title
